title: Servicios de Transportes Aéreos Fueguinos
summary: Servicios de Transportes Aéreos Fueguinos S.A. (also known as STAF Airlines) was an Argentinean cargo airline based in Buenos Aires, operating scheduled and chartered flights to destinations throughout the Americas using leased aircraft. The airline went out of business in 2005.
text:
Servicios de Transportes Aéreos Fueguinos S.A. (also known as STAF Airlines) was an Argentinean cargo airline based in Buenos Aires, operating scheduled and chartered flights to destinations throughout the Americas using leased aircraft. The airline went out of business in 2005.
